title: PARENT-ACTIVITY (15s) — Papa stuck in tube slide, kids cheer 'YOU'RE IT!'
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show family-comedy shot at @playground-tube-slide — soft mulch ground at the bottom of the frame, brown/tan curving tube-slide tunnel visible CENTER-FRAME with its opening at the bottom. POSITION LOCK — Papa stays half-in / half-out of the bottom of the tube slide throughout the entire 15s, his head and shoulders softly visible at the slide opening, his lower body inside the tube. Papa does NOT move forward or backward through the slide, does NOT pop out, does NOT slide back up. Sara and Eva stay in their exact spots at the bottom of the slide throughout. Exactly THREE people in the entire frame: one Papa, one Sara, one Eva. @Papa already half-stuck mid-tube at the bottom opening of the slide — his head, shoulders, and arms softly visible peeking out of the slide opening, the rest of his body inside the tube. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both palms softly pressed against the inside of the tube wall, comically wedged. Big silly warm dad-grin with goofy 'oops I'm too big' expression, eyes crinkled with cheerful defeat. NOT scared, NOT distressed, comically resigned. Papa stays in this exact stuck position throughout the entire 15s. @Sara already standing on the mulch on the LEFT side of the slide opening with both feet planted, ponytail with bow, both hands cupped softly beside her mouth in a cheerful taunt gesture. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both cupped at mouth. Sara stays at this exact spot throughout. @Eva already standing on the mulch on the RIGHT side of the slide opening with both feet planted right next to Sara on the same side, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, both hands clapping softly with delight at her chest. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both clapping at chest. Eva stays at this exact spot throughout. The mulch and slide stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa wiggles his shoulders gently in his stuck position, big silly defeated grin. Papa (warm cheerful muffled silly-wolf voice from his stuck spot): "Awwww! The wolf got STUCK!" Sara giggles helplessly, both hands still cupped at her mouth. Eva claps faster in her exact spot. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara cheers from her exact spot, both hands still cupped at mouth. Sara (cheerful sing-song taunt, soft and playful): "You're IT, silly wolf!" Eva joins in, both hands still clapping in place. Eva (cheerful sing-song taunt, beaming): "You're IT! You're IT!" Papa waggles his shoulders gently, still half-stuck. (BEAT 3 — 10-15s) Both girls together from their exact spots, sing-songy taunt in unison: "You're IT, silly wolf-y! YOU'RE IT!" Papa lets out a warm cheerful chuckle from his stuck position, eyes still crinkled with playful defeat. Papa (warm warm muffled chuckle): "Aww, you piggies are TOO clever!" All three giggling warmly. Cheerful warm kid-show family-comedy lighting throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both palms inside the tube. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both cupped at her mouth. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both clapping at her chest. Papa stays half-stuck in the slide tube throughout the entire 15s — no popping out, no sliding back up, no climbing free. Each girl stays grounded with both feet on the mulch throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no climbing on Papa. NO scary face on Papa — comically defeated and silly throughout, never distressed.
